note: This is especially useful for students, travellers, import buyers, researchers, and anyone comparing foreign product or service information.

title: ASK GEMINI ACROSS YOUR GOOGLE APPS
what_it_solves: Helps you find details buried across Gmail, Calendar, Maps, YouTube, and Photos without opening each app separately.
what_to_do: Use Gemini connected apps when you want AI help with your own Google information, where the feature is available.

note: This is powerful because it uses personal context. Review connected-app permissions and avoid using it on shared devices.

title: AUTO-TRANSLATE YOUTUBE CAPTIONS
what_it_solves: Helps you learn from videos in other languages by reading subtitles in a language you understand.
what_to_do: Use YouTube caption settings and Auto-translate when the video has captions but not in your preferred language.

note: This is great for lectures, recipes, tutorials, product reviews, and explainers. Accuracy depends on the original audio and captions.

title: MAKE YOUTUBE REMIND YOU TO STOP
what_it_solves: Helps you control endless video watching, especially at night or during exam, work, or family time.
what_to_do: Use YouTube's time watched, take-a-break, and bedtime reminder settings to interrupt mindless viewing.

steps.text: the YouTube app.
your profile picture.

a take-a-break reminder for long viewing sessions.
a bedtime reminder if late-night scrolling is the bigger problem.

note: The reminder will not fix discipline by itself, but it creates a useful speed breaker before one video becomes one hour.

title: MESSAGE YOURSELF ON WHATSAPP
what_it_solves: Turns WhatsApp into a quick personal inbox for notes, links, photos, addresses, voice notes, documents, and reminders you do not want to lose.
what_to_do: Use WhatsApp's Message Yourself feature instead of sending reminders to random friends or groups.

note: This is very handy for temporary information like parking spots, courier photos, shopping lists, UPI screenshots, and travel details.

title: SEARCH WHATSAPP CHATS BY DATE
what_it_solves: Helps you find old messages from a known day without scrolling through months of family, school, office, or society-group chats.
what_to_do: Use WhatsApp's search-by-date option when you remember when something was discussed but not the exact words.

steps.text: the WhatsApp chat you want to search.

note: This is excellent for finding old addresses, fee notices, meeting decisions, school instructions, and payment discussions.

title: PIN ONE IMPORTANT WHATSAPP MESSAGE
what_it_solves: Keeps one critical message visible inside a chat, such as an address, meeting link, payment detail, deadline, or event instruction.
what_to_do: Pin a specific WhatsApp message instead of expecting everyone to scroll back and find it.

steps.text: the WhatsApp chat or group.

note: This is different from pinning a chat. It pins the exact message inside the conversation, which is far more useful for groups.

title: SEND SENSITIVE MEDIA AS VIEW ONCE
what_it_solves: Adds privacy when sending photos, videos, or voice messages that should not stay permanently in the recipient's chat.
what_to_do: Use WhatsApp View Once for temporary information such as IDs, codes, locations, or private media.

steps.text: the WhatsApp chat.

View Once again each time you want the same protection.

note: View Once reduces persistence, but it is not magic. The recipient may still remember, photograph, or otherwise capture sensitive information.

title: CREATE CUSTOM WHATSAPP LISTS FOR BUSY CHATS
what_it_solves: Helps you separate noisy chats from important ones, so school, family, work, building, and customer chats do not all compete equally.
what_to_do: Use WhatsApp Lists as custom filters for the chats you want to check together.

note: This is useful when your WhatsApp is both personal and professional. It makes the app feel less chaotic.

title: VERIFY GOLD JEWELLERY BEFORE PAYING
what_it_solves: Helps you check whether hallmarked jewellery and BIS-marked products are genuine before you trust the seller's word.
what_to_do: Use the BIS Care app to verify HUID, ISI mark, or licence details while buying jewellery or certified products.

steps.text: the BIS Care app from the official app store.

the purity, product, licence, and seller details before paying.

note: Do this before purchase, especially for high-value jewellery. A hallmark symbol alone is not enough if the HUID or licence details do not match.

title: PRACTISE SPOKEN ENGLISH WITH AI VOICE
what_it_solves: Gives students, job seekers, and professionals a patient speaking partner for interviews, presentations, customer calls, and everyday English practice.
what_to_do: Use ChatGPT Voice Mode to practise aloud instead of only typing questions and reading answers.

note: This works best when you ask for gentle correction, shorter sentences, and a realistic Indian context rather than generic grammar lessons.

title: USE TEMPORARY CHAT FOR SENSITIVE AI QUESTIONS
what_it_solves: Helps you ask one-off questions without adding them to your normal ChatGPT history or memory.
